{"id":"co-68q","title":"components rig patrol missing setup_command and test_command config","description":"Patrol mol-refinery-patrol has setup_command=empty and test_command='go test ./...' defaults, but components is a Node.js/TypeScript project. Running tests requires npm install first (setup_command) and npm test (test_command). Without these, tests fail silently or with 'command not found'. The rig config.json should set: setup_command=npm install, test_command=npm test.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"alan.chusuei@uipath.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T18:29:25Z","created_by":"components/refinery","updated_at":"2026-03-12T18:29:25Z"}

{"id":"co-dde","title":"DataTable Phase 1","description":"Build DataTable Phase 1 using TanStack Table v8. Requirements: typed column definitions, client-side sorting (single and multi-column), client-side filtering (global search + per-column text/select/date range/number range filters), client-side pagination with page size selector, column visibility toggle, row selection (single and multi with bulk actions toolbar), row-level actions (inline button or context menu), clickable rows (onRowClick), loading state (skeleton rows), empty state, error state, export to CSV, refresh button slot, custom toolbar action slot. Built with Tailwind + shadcn Table primitive. Include Storybook stories and Vitest tests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"alan.chusuei@uipath.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T13:05:21Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-12T13:05:21Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Add Storybook stories for all components in the library, each with explicit light AND dark mode variants: Button (update existing story), DataTable (sample data, sorting, pagination — light + dark), Spinner/Loader (all size/color variants — light + dark). Every component story must demonstrate both modes. Dark mode is toggled via the Storybook toolbar (co-qx0), but each story should also have named dark mode story exports. Purpose: visual QA of full component library before building the CRM rig."}
